channel.title: Programming Language on yexca'Blog
channel.description: Recent content in Programming Language on yexca'Blog

item.title: Python PyInstaller Packaging
item.description: 📢 This article was translated by gemini-2.5-flash PyInstaller packaging is system-dependent. On Windows, it creates an .exe executable; on Linux, it outputs an ELF binary. Cross-platform packaging isn’t supported. Installation Install via pip: 1 pip install pyinstaller Package as a Single File Use the --onefile argument: 1 pyinstaller --onefile main.py Common Arguments For packaging Windows applications, common arguments include: --windowed: Hides the console window (if …

item.title: GoLang Backend Intro
item.description: 📢 This article was translated by gemini-2.5-flash A simple, no-framework Go backend. Backend development is typically interface-driven, or, as some say, CRUD engineering. This article will use Go to show how to read data from a database and return JSON. Database This example reads category names and IDs from a MySQL database’s categories table. Here’s the database structure: 1 2 3 4 5 6 DROP TABLE IF EXISTS categories ; CREATE TABLE categories ( id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY …

item.title: GoLang Channels
item.description: 📢 This article was translated by gemini-2.5-flash Golang Series Hello GoLang: https://blog.yexca.net/en/archives/154 GoLang (var and const) 变量与常量: https://blog.yexca.net/en/archives/155 GoLang (func) 函数: https://blog.yexca.net/en/archives/156 GoLang (slice and map) 切片: https://blog.yexca.net/en/archives/160 GoLang (OOP) 面向对象: https://blog.yexca.net/en/archives/162 GoLang (reflect) 反射: https://blog.yexca.net/en/archives/204 GoLang (struct tag) 结构体标签: …
